description: CodeWiser contradiction rules (v4.2). contradiction_checker evaluates cross_field_rules after synthesis. resolution_policy MUST be one of resolution_policies[]. Expanded catalog (not a minimal stub).

cross_field_rules.user_message: Local-only storage keeps each user's data on their own device — other users typically cannot see shared data. You indicated multiple users. Should we switch to cloud storage, keep separate per-device data, or use local-first with sync later?
Real-time collaboration usually needs a shared backend. Local-only stores data on one device. Should we move to cloud or narrow the collaboration feature?
A $0 stack rarely covers production real-time video (infra cost). Should we shrink the feature, raise budget, or defer video to a later tier?
Single-user app: do you still want login (e.g. for future multi-device sync), or run without accounts on-device only?
A listed integration needs a paid vendor while budget is $0. Defer that integration to v1.1 / Future in the blueprint unless you increase budget.
Offline-first with cloud-only storage conflicts. I recommend local-first with sync later or local cache + cloud — reversible default unless you object.
